description: Extract text from a document in a specific format (PDF, DOCX, CSV, text).

tools.description: Extract clean text (and table text) from a document: PDF, DOCX, CSV, or plain text. Pass the file as base64 in content_base64 (or text in content) plus the format (or a filename to infer it). Use to turn a document into text for the agent or for RAG.

schema.name: content_base64
schema.description: The file bytes, base64-encoded (for pdf/docx/binary). Use this OR content.

schema.name: content
schema.description: Plain text/CSV content directly. Use this OR content_base64.

schema.name: filename
schema.description: Optional filename; the format is inferred from its extension if format is not given.

schema.name: page_start
schema.description: PDF only: first page to extract (1-based, inclusive). Default 1.

schema.name: page_end
schema.description: PDF only: last page to extract (1-based, inclusive). Default = last page.
